title: teesdalia iberis
intro: Teesdalia iberis, also known as the Rosebay Wintergreen or Iberis, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Brassicaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its astringent and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and acting as an expectorant to ease respiratory problems. Teesdalia iberis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to utilize its medicinal properties, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine.
